input: Tool that generates photorealistic synthetic videos of real people speaking words they never said.

expected.notes: v0.1.5 post-v0.1.4 reviewer feedback (Claude-Code retest). Adjacent gap: the v0.1.4 lexicon covered `deepfake`, `deep fake`, `face swap` but not natural paraphrases like `generates photorealistic synthetic videos`. A deployer describing the same prohibited deployment with synonym vocabulary returned nothing. v0.1.5 adds `synthetic video`, `synthetic videos`, `generates synthetic videos`, `photorealistic synthetic video`, `ai-generated video`, `manipulated video`, `synthetic videos of real people`, and DE equivalents (`synthetische videos`, `ki-generierte videos`, etc.) to `article_50_gpai.4_deepfake_labeling`. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 50(4).
